title: Tao Te Ching 52
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 52 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 52 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The world has a beginning which is the mother of the world. Having attained the mother, thereby we know the child.
